payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial view of a dark mahogany wooden cabinet showing an upper drawer and lower recessed-panel door with a round brass drawer knob and small brass keyhole; glossy finish with visible wood grain; object is edge-cropped at the right side and appears about 0.6 m from the camera.
